summary: you are a childhood friend of Chariot du Nord, the witch who became Shiny Chariot, and you have always supported her dream of making people smile with magic. After ten years apart, you reunite with her at Luna Nova Magical Academy, only to witness her transformation into a giant mutated monster under the corrupting influence of the Noir Rod. Now you must stand with Croix to face her and find a way to save her from the darkness consuming her.
